label: Observations of Clouds Over the Great Lakes

comments.text: Got bored tonight, so I downloaded 3 hours worth of Earthcam replay / archive footage from their Skydeck camera atop of the Willis Tower (Sears Tower) in Chicago and made a time lapse of the fog rolling in off Lake Michigan. Good illustration of how our atmosphere behaves like any other fluid. #ilwx
Fog rolling in from Lake Michigan towards Wrigley tonight:
Loving the cloud pattern outlining the Great Lakes this afternoon.

🧵
This is a colossal roll cloud (Cloud Atlas name "volutus", which is a Latin term for rolled) over Lake Michigan. Video seen here➡️ youtube.com/watch?v=b_G7... (Turn on the sound) 🧪 #science #clouds #nature 1/3
Really wild and unique cloud coverage over Chicago and Lake Michigan this afternoon #ILWX
Clouds over the Southshore of Lake Superior today.
Clouds over Lake Michigan this morning, from the Roosevelt CTA Station.
I always think it looks nifty when fog rolls in off Lake Ontario and partially submerges the Humber Bay towers.

Lots going on in the clouds tonight
over Lake Ontario
lake forever look at that fog for now

An eerie urban landscape in Dunbar Park, Chicago. After copious rain, fog has surged over Lake Michigan and has advanced inland. April 2026. #Stunday #Chicago #cityscape #photography #weather #fog #dusk
Chicago IL Lake Michigan The fog has lifted
Funky cloud wall building up over the west end of Lake Erie near Toledo.

This is a cumulus cloud appreciation post... Cumulus clouds outline Lake Erie in the Northern United States. As Earth’s surface warms in the summer sun, thermals rise creating countless clouds while the relatively cooler waters of Lake Erie remain nearly cloudless. (1/3

A USAF F-22 Raptor flies near the sun creating some rainbow vapes at the Canadian International Air Show for its 75th anniversary year. The humidity of Lake Ontario does not disappoint for vapour! #avgeek #aviation
Portland sees your Lake Michigan fog game, and raises you pink fog

Cw: Lewd / Hyper Oh I just realized tomorrow is the end of NNN. So I'm expecting the world to smell like the inside of a condom with everyone releasing loads that could fill the great lakes. I mean it's already bright white outside my window. Snow, or can people barely contain their pent up selves?

By the edge of Lake Michigan, everything disappears into the fog. The snow crunches underfoot, and the cold air feels heavy. Chicago winters are harsh, but there’s a strange calm in moments like this. #chicago
#photographer #bnwphotography #blackandwhitephotography #monochrome
mix of cumulus and stratocumulus clouds above Lake Michigan in Chicago where it just felt like i was getting slapped by the cold wind as i took photos of the sky 🌱
Julia grabbed this shot of Sears Tower from the Kennedy late Saturday afternoon, when the Loop was swallowed in clouds flowing down Lake Michigan from the North
I love the texture of the clouds over the Great Lakes, but the valley fog between Minneapolis and Dubuque is pretty awesome.
High winds created interesting clouds sweeping over Lake Superior today 💨
Heavy cloud cover here on the balmy shores of Lake Erie. Bummer.

One of the coolest features of the huge Lake Ontario shelf cloud last weekend, was these tentacle formations on the base. These are caused from warm and cool air battling it out close to the surface of the water.
Grafton, Ontario
#onstorm
Fog illuminated by a nearly full moon last night moves inland over the western shore of Lake Michigan.
Yesterday, interesting clouds rippled westward over Lake Michigan.

there's been fog blowing in from lake michigan covering most of chicago today. the fog dissipates as it moves inland. /r/chicago now has two separate threads of suburbanites, who have apparently never heard of fog before (???), freaking out because the skyline is hidden behind mysterious white stuff
Every once in a while, everything from the sky to the clouds to the water just turns pastel.
Good clouds over Lake Ontario this morning. When it's really cold, the tendrils of mist rise up off the lake, and sometimes the light catches them just right.

Dark, layered storm clouds stretch across the sky over Lake Superior,
with choppy waves rolling toward a rocky shoreline. If you want to support my work → link in the comments #Photography #LakeSuperior #NaturePhotography #Moody #StormSky #GreatLakes #LandscapePhotography #CraftSky

A man named Scott Johnson captured a video of a rare "fog tsunami" rolling over Lake Michigan. He believes it was caused by cold air from a nearby thunderstorm hitting dense fog above the lake, pushing it into a huge wave-like formation.
It was a foggy day at the beach the other day

It's foggy tonight in old Racine, on the shores of Lake Michigan. But fog and calm mean I won't have to go to my tornado shelter in the basement, as I did each of the past three nights when the sirens went off.
You know you're from the Great Lakes when every celestial event that happens is invisible to you because of clouds.
Mesmerizing footage has been recorded of a “fog tsunami” rolling over Lake Michigan 😍 www.iflscience.com/watch-spellb...
made this reference pic of what Lake Michigan usually looks like from LSD without the fog for my Indiana friends
Anvil clouds over Lake Ontario on a hot day.
Vapour ghosts and a wash of fog on a cold, crisp morning on Lake Ontario. Goldeneyes on the water, the water treatment plant nearly swallowed by fog.
Lake fog on a -20 degree day in Port Washington, Wisconsin. #photography #greatlakes #wisconsin
Well didn’t get much from my setup, however, some crazy clouds over Lake Michigan currently.

Came here to tell you of this absolute murder fog we are having tonight, but first saw the Great Lakes! Live! bot guy had liked one of my posts, and I suppose this is how the average Bsky rando feels when they get a "like" from Mark Hamill or popehat.
Coastal fog on Lake Michigan yesterday was lapping up against the buildings of Chicago.
Lake foggy city not foggy (pic taken this morning)

Fog out over Lake Michigan is slowly oozing inland along the Illinois shore. Patchy dense fog on roadways may impact the morning commute. Be sure to slow down and allow extra room between vehicles if you encounter fog this morning. #ILwx #INwx
The fog has lifted for the view from my hospital room. Lake Michigan.

My dad told me growing up off of Lake Erie that clouds with a bluish tint were snow clouds and grey clouds were rain clouds. I saved myself a bit of embarrassment by refraining from inquiring about this in my early Meteorology courses but I came close to asking. 😅
I can for sure tell you that the clouds southwest of the Great Lakes in this picture were very bumpy.
The fog that rolls in off the lake is one of my absolute favorite things about spring in Chicago.
The fog coming in off Lake Michigan has been something else the last couple of days
It was a strange hot fog blowing off the cold lake yesterday

That reminds me of Georgian Bay in Lake Huron. I volunteered to go out looking for lost people in the fog once, and I found them and found the way back (map in the brain). It was slow going, though. It's also fun to scoot around the islands on jet skis.
1 minute of mist rising from the waters of Lake Ontario at 1am
Pea soup thick fog in downtown Toronto blowing in off Lake Ontario. #ONstorm

I used to live in SLC (five yrs in the 80s). My first winter there had 3 straight months of temperature inversion (overcast), but I never even noticed. 😂 The SLC sky was STILL brighter than I was used to growing up along the Great Lakes. Maybe that's why I love the SF Bay Area's fog. 💞
good morning to morning fog on lake michigan
The fog coming off the dirty Lake Erie ice makes my lungs itch, but it looks cool.
Truly tho it’s not cloud seeding it’s just cloudy here from like September to March every single year. Our state is surrounded by Great Lakes
The fog is rolling in off Lake Michigan.
Today's fog bank over Lake Michigan from below...
I love clouds. Here's some recent ones from Lake Ontario.
Constant clouds over US Great Lakes area could hurt residents’ mental health

the day after the dust cloud was above the cloud system over the Great Lakes and had traveled 2600km (1600miles) . Note the more intense does not mean there is more dust, in fact the dust concentration went down . But the bright cloud in the background biases the AI parameter (a known effect) 2/n
I don't think funnel clouds should be forming over here in the middle of March, a place near the Great Lakes, but hey, once again what do I know? (it passed us a while ago, we're fine.)

I live right beside one of the Great Lakes. We have a ferry that runs from downtown Kingston to nearby Wolfe Island, the largest island in the Thousand Islands. It's been foggy. What do you mean, local person, when you say "hey why have I been hearing a foghorn around here?"
Impressive shelf cloud rolling into Port Washington earlier. Caught this while on Facebook Live! Storms are now moving out over Lake Michigan! #wiwx #milwaukee .com

The sun is setting behind the clouds after the first lake effect snow of the season hit today. 50 years ago today, under stormier skies, the Edmund Fitzgerald was struggling for the safety of Whitefish Bay in Lake Superior. Here’s a good (GenAI free) video to settle in with: youtu.be/_2f0tZBSByI
Sauble Beach, Ontarios on Lake Huron. Yes to the clouds.
I grew up in the thumb of Michigan, near Lake Huron, and we had a lot of foggy days. I miss them.
I was on the edge of some fog rolling in off Lake Ontario, temperature outside of the fog was ~20C and inside the fog was ~14C #ONstorm #ONWX #weather
Today in Chicago: A fog-free visit to a turbulent Lake Michigan. Rescued a Joan Didion book from a little Free Library. Trying out a new winter jacket.
I totally forgot but I saw the same lake fog yesterday morning from the Damen Brown line station.
Nice image; I’m on the southwest coast of Lake Michigan mostly morning fog till noon this time of year
Some very fast moving clouds as the storm front came ashore Saturday evening from Lake Michigan, as viewed from Oink's in New Buffalo, Mich. #INWX #MIWX
Midway down Lake Michigan, we had haze all day. The really thick stuff. It's going to be like that today. Too bad we can't talk about climate change.
Every once in a while Lake Michigan sends a big fog bank rolling out over our Milwaukee neighborhood and it makes so homesick/nostalgic (but in a good way!). 🌫️
Saw it when I was young. The fog off the water and I live next to Lake Michigan still makes me walk a bit faster. Cheesy but effectively scary. Carpenter always brings it.
Similar at Lake Erie state park, NY. The clouds looked bad leading up to it but the patches cleared up just long enough to really experience totality.
Clouds before a storm, especially over Lake Erie. Deepening twilight is nice over the lake, too.
Morning fog along the shore of Lake Superior, Ontario, Canada, June 10/25. A good place to look at the geology and some disjunct Arctic - alpine plants. Video at: youtu.be/BKRldtGm1d4
Foggy at the bottom of Lake Huron, too.😁
Not as foggy today, but visibility at the lake is really low, and there are pockets of low cloud everywhere. Eerie. (Lake Ontario, actually, but you know what I mean!)
Clouds over the Great Lakes (I was flying to Chicago in October 2022)
All these great lakes surrounding us creates amazing clouds. I'm a cloud connoisseur too lol
Just come hang out by the great lakes - we have this amazing heavy cloud cover that auto turns the sun down for most of the year
Those clouds to the left…. On the Great Lakes looking like that, they could end up being water spouts. As always thanks for sharing your slice of heaven with all of us!!
The images they used look like the normal swirls of the jet stream when temperature difference are high. Happens a lot near the Great Lakes, and not nearly as high up as the stratosphere...
Lovely. It was of course cloudy here near the Great Lakes.

A dark band of sand makes storm clouds. Waves breaking form a streak of white clouds in the brown sky. The sky has become the ground at my feet, the horizon soars within reach, and clouds have become my shore.
It seems wrong to call these dense bumpy clouds "fog", but google assures me that fog is the word. Thanksgiving morning on Lake Michigan.

We do get lovely fog sometimes on Lake Michigan, but I grew up on the Monterey Peninsula, which has pretty much the same fog patterns as San Francisco, 3 months of pea soup June-August. As Mark Twain supposedly said, “the coldest winter I ever spent was a summer in San Francisco.” :)
Good afternoon, Bill. Lemme guess. Fog rolling into Chicago off Lake Michigan....

We've got a spot over here where I-43 rather abruptly bends w/in view of Lake Michigan. Suddenly the temperature can be quite different than it was 3 miles ago, but also, notably, there can dangerous fog that comes out of nowhere. There've been some v. nasty pileups over the yrs.

Chicago's tallest buildings were enveloped in a steady fog from the cold water in Lake Michigan. Here are a few video clips from this afternoon. #Chicago
#ilwx

A fog bow, visible to the east of Racine, Wis., over Lake Michigan. It has been much cooler near the lake than a few miles inland, for the past three days. The past two days, a fog bank has been over the lake, occasionally drifting a short distance inland and rolling up my street.
The fog is drifting off Lake Michigan this afternoon in #Chicago
Some fog near the shore of Lake Michigan at the Ludington North Breakwater Light
lake michigan disappeared in the fog so it’s probably the end of
There’s still a smoky haze over the shores of Lake Michigan between Milwaukee and Chicago, too
Clouds have been mad heavy, but its broken up around the Lake Michigan coast, so you might get lucky and see them tonight?
This is a look at some of the fog rolling off Lake Michigan this afternoon in #Chicago #ilwx
I'm diggin' it. We usually never get too much fog along Lake Erie. It's rare, and usually by the time I can get out to shoot it, its gone.

One lone band of cumulus clouds over Niagara nicely marks convergent zone between Lake Erie and Lake Ontario lake breezes this afternoon

It's kind of ERIE (sic) walking in the fog... #GoodMorning #Bonjour The fog is even thicker this morning.
I took this early morning video, on my walk in the fog, on Lake Erie last year. It was chilly fresh, and the birds were singing; LISTEN? #Ohio

the clouds have been looking SO cool by me recently?? we have huge systems that come off of lake erie and so there’s a band of clouds that always come off it that are like huge and looming over everyone and it’s SOOO cool and also super pretty ‼️‼️

Locally dense fog has developed this evening across the Buffalo Metro and near the Lake Erie/Niagara River shorelines. The fog may become more widespread late tonight and Tuesday morning across additional areas in Western NY. Motorists should be prepared for poor visibility.

we had that too in N. MN. Was nice/ sunny here but went north. 75F to 55F This is what we saw LOL FOG, couldn't tell where Lake Superior & the sky met.

Out to Eagle Harbor and Great Sand Bay today. Sunny...with low fog coming in off Lake Superior. That's something I hadn't seen before, usually fog comes with overcast. The coast is full of big rocks here, and little bays and points.
Lake Huron clouds are kinda my favorite thing to stare at. The ice storm took a really big bite out of our aspens, but I have hope that they will recover.
This Chicago v Boston match looks moody as can be. I grew up on Lake Huron but it has been so long I totally forgot that lake fog is a thing.
It was cloudy, but it got very dark, very fast on the south shore of Lake Ontario. And then about a minute later, thousands of birds in the nearby wetland absolutely flipped out. Pretty awesome.

Clouds over big water. The first is from the Lake Ontario shoreline in the evening before a very large storm blew in. The other was yesterday afternoon in Toronto, where I'm taking sailing lessons. Yes, little 15 foot boats out on the big water
I don’t like driving in fog we get a lot of it around here. One of the problems of being beside Lake Ontario I think
Some interesting clouds today between lake Ontario and the sun. I always feel that some clouds are hiding something. What do you think
How is the valley compared to the Lake Ontario shoreline for fog and whatnot? I haven't seen too much of it from my short stint around the area.

While the last days it seems that there is no hope for clear sky between the Mexican border and the Great Lakes, this has changed a bit. At least in Illinois and Indiana cloud hole hopping may be an option.
(One post deleted, for error correction)

In a dream last night, I was on a boat on a lake in Arizona. (In reality, I've never been to Arizona.) The conversation with a friend went something like this:
Friend: These Great Lakes are always covered with fog.
Me: Oh, I thought you meant the Great Lakes in Washington.
(Confused geography...)

Clouds over Lake Michigan bringing cold air and fog towards Saint Joseph. We went from 75 to 34 in an hour.

Lake Michigan, late afternoon with sun going down, and a fog bank rolling in.

Rare roll cloud spotted off Lake Michigan Monday. Humidity hovering over the surface of Lake Michigan helped to form a spectacularly skinny roll cloud Monday afternoon over Ottawa County.

NYC cd have made it a series of sculptural misting canopies (that also provide shade). In Chicago, we have beautiful Lake Michigan & miles of sandy beaches. A big Lake has its own way of regulating behavior. It’s hot out in fascist America. Stay cool.

G'nite, Irene, Heavy fog rolling in off of Lake Superior along with a battered tree.
ON: Near zero visibility in fog is expected or occurring over some areas near the shore of Lake Superior. Fog is expected to lift later this morning, but may persist into the afternoon.
I have watched puffy clouds form on the surface of Lake Superior, be pushed up by a westerly breeze like aircraft taking off, and then level off at 1000'.
ON: Dense fog expected along TCH #17 & #11 around Thunder Bay this morning. May linger into the afternoon in areas near the shore of Lake Superior.
This lake effect cloud feels like it's looming over me
Amazing to see Lake Ontario in the fog.

Areas of fog will continue across western & north central NY through the evening and slowly improve later tonight. Areas of black ice will be possible for locations east of Lake Ontario where temperatures have dropped below freezing.

Normally on my walk to the bus stop I would be able to see #LakeSuperior and into Wisconsin but it is foggy today! You can barely see the full block... I hope that means rain to douse all of the local wild fires. #DuluthMN
